Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-25 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data reveals two exceptional performers dominating the long-term momentum rankings. LINC ranks #1 with a score of 95.3, displaying extraordinary consistency across all timeframes—returning 1374% over 10 years while beating SPY by 1151% over the same period, and all four moving averages are aligned bullishly. ISSC follows with similarly impressive metrics, posting a 10-year return of 955% and a 1-year return of 311%, though notably outperforming SPY by 295% over just one year while showing weaker 5-year relative performance (286% vs SPY). Both stocks pass all momentum ratio thresholds and maintain above-200-day moving averages, suggesting sustained uptrends rather than temporary bounces. The correlation data for LINC shows relatively low ties to major sector ETFs (highest at 0.35 with XLB materials), indicating these gains come from company-specific strength rather than broad sector momentum. These represent extreme outliers in long-term performance that warrant examination of underlying business fundamentals rather than momentum alone.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
